orchestrator_consumed.note: runtime logs: deserialized + dispatched + published output

routing_request.note: orchestrator published ModelRoutingIntent (correlation_id present in topic + logs)

routing_decision.note: routing reducer never consumed the intent — consumer group Empty, 0 members, TOTAL-LAG 103

root_cause: Runtime auto-wiring AttributeError: contracts node_delegation_routing_reducer + node_delegation_quality_gate_reducer reference non-existent handler classes HandlerDelegationRouting / HandlerQualityGate (modules expose only a delta() function). Auto-wiring aborts the whole contract (non-strict), so the NEW HandlerRoutingIntent/HandlerQualityGateIntent operations on the same contract also get no consumer. Pre-existing defect masked by the bridge calling delta() directly; surfaced now that the reducers must be live bus consumers.
proposed_fix: Option B: remove the vestigial delegation.route / delegation.quality_gate handler_routing entries from both reducer contracts (they only ever worked via the in-process bridge); keep only HandlerRoutingIntent / HandlerQualityGateIntent as the bus-facing consumers. NOT yet applied — awaiting review per two-strike.
